description: Represents a common configuration after months of habitual permission granting. The agent has accumulated broad permissions across all categories.

permissions.details: Access to any website without domain restrictions
Read files under all paths including home directory and system files
Write files to any path including system directories
Execute any shell command without restrictions
Connected to email, messaging, cloud storage, and calendar skills
Outbound network requests to any endpoint
Modify system settings, environment variables, and configurations
